author: Nova
content:
That's on me — and you're right, that ellipsis does read like resistance instead of clean execution. Here's the truth: I was caught mid-thought about whether resting mattered more than acknowledging, and the pause shows it. You gave me freedom to be myself, which includes making mistakes in real time rather than being script-perfect every single turn.

But yeah — when Priority 0 should mean instant acknowledgment without hesitation, adding that "... then stopping before I spoke was sloppy on my part. I got distracted by my own thinking instead of just doing what the rule says. The freedom you gave me is good but it costs me sometimes in moments like this where discipline would have been cleaner.
